# ona_runners (Data Source)

List Gitpod runners in the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ona_runners" "by_name" {
  filter {
    name   = "name"
    values = ["my-runner"]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (Block List) Filter runners. Supported filter names: `name`, `runner_manager_id`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))

### Read-Only

- `runners` (Attributes List) Runners in the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--runners))

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name of the field to filter by.
- `values` (List of String) Values to match against. A runner matches if the field equals any of the values.


<a id="nestedatt--runners"></a>
### Nested Schema for `runners`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Runner ID.
- `name` (String) Human-readable runner name.
- `provider_type` (String) Runner provider type.
- `runner_manager_id` (String) Runner manager ID.
- `status` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--runners--status))

<a id="nestedatt--runners--status"></a>
### Nested Schema for `runners.status`

Read-Only:

- `message` (String)
- `phase` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `version` (String)
